title: Wild Card
content:
Clayton brothers at the corral,
        its Earp City today
        tumbleweed junction for numerous lives,
        not to mention lies
        swift-draw artists
        encased in a memory of stone
        boots up ...
        with all the forlorn grace of
        being pushed in front
        of a train.
meaning:
"Wild Card" is a quintessential example of Paul Cameron Brown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
